title: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : Chobe District Council (dogs) (model Bye-laws) (adoption) Bye-laws
title_en: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : Chobe District Council (dogs) (model Bye-laws) (adoption) Bye-laws

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
These Bye-Laws may be cited as the Chobe District Council (Dogs) (Model Bye-Laws) (Adoption) Bye-Laws*.
*Originally made under the Township Act now repealed, these regulations have been continued under s 94(2) of the Local Government Act, 2013.

provisions.title: Interpretation

definitions.definition: the Council Secretary or any officer of the Council duly authorised by the Council Secretary to perform duties under these Bye-Laws
any road, street, thoroughfare, bridge, foot pavement, open space or park within the area of jurisdiction of the Council and any enclosed space controlled by the Council
